title: Salty Gooey Dutch Renkon-Lotus-Root Bake
description: A delicious, crowd-pleasing Dutch bake featuring renkon-lotus-root, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is also ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly, making it a great option for those following this dietary philosophy.
instructions: Peel and slice the renkon-lotus-root into 1/4-inch thick rounds.
In a large bowl, mix together the butter, brown sugar, honey, vanilla extract, cinnamon, allspice, and salt until well combined.
Add the sliced renkon-lotus-root to the bowl and mix until the root is evenly coated with the sugar mixture.
Pour the almond milk into the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish and arrange the renkon-lotus-root slices on top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and place it in a bain-marie (a larger baking dish filled with hot water) at the same temperature for 45 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue to bake for an additional 15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the root is tender.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve warm, topped with additional brown sugar or cinnamon if desired.
